manufacturer.note: Cadbury has been owned by Mondelez International since the 2010 Kraft takeover.

ingredientsText.value: Milk, Sugar, Cocoa Butter, Cocoa Mass, Vegetable Fats (Palm, Shea), Dried Skimmed Milk, Dried Whey (from Milk), Emulsifiers (E442, E476, Soya Lecithin), Milk Fat, Flavourings
ingredientsText.note: Open Food Facts transcription. An Ocado listing for the standard bar gives a shorter ingredient list (likely a different pack size or a condensed retailer transcription); this discrepancy should route to human adjudication rather than be silently reconciled. Vegetable fats (palm, shea) are permitted up to 5% under GB/EU chocolate rules.

sugars.note: About 56 to 57g per 100g, stable across 2019 to 2026. The FSA-linked sugar reduction produced a separate lower-sugar variant (see the timeline event), not a reduction of the standard bar.

provenance.value: Soya lecithin declared in the emulsifiers on the current label
Carries a may-contain-nuts precautionary statement on the current label
